title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 650.280 - Chief and deputy inspectors to furnish bond
text:
650.280.  Chief and deputy inspectors to furnish bond. — The chief inspector shall furnish a bond in the sum of five thousand dollars and each of the deputy inspectors, employed and paid by the state, shall furnish a bond in the sum of two thousand dollars, conditioned upon the faithful performance of their duties and upon a true account of moneys handled by them respectively and the payment thereof to the proper recipient.  The cost of the bonds shall be paid by the state.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1060 § 18)
